segments.text: If you are currently breathing and also blinking, you are cooked! Get out!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Woah, SpongeBob! That’s harsh! They need a second chance! Subscribe right now for a lifeline!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: Avoid saying the most common! Name a creature that lives in Bikini Bottom!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: 3... 2... 1... Time's up, bestie!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: If you said SQUIDWARD, you fell for the trap! That choice is cringe!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Survivors, congrats on having the ultimate rizz! Like the video right now to lock in your victory!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Ahoy, mateys! Avoid sayin' the most common! Name a specific vehicle Spongebob has failed to drive!
segments.speaker: MrKrabs

segments.text: The clock is tickin'! Choose wisely!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: If ye picked the BOATING SCHOOL BOAT, yer wallet is safe! Everyone else, get back to work!
segments.speaker: MrKrabs

segments.text: FINAL TRAP! Did Mrs. Puff have a first name: A) Yes, B) No. Pick A or B now! Comment your streak if you made it this far!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: If you possess a heartbeat and are not currently rich, you are eliminated! Go back to Ohio.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: Squidward, that’s so mean! Wait! If you subscribe now, you can get a participation trophy!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: We are playing 'Say the Same Thing'! Name a popular topping for a Krabby Patty.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: Decision time! Don't let your brain lag!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: If you didn't say LETTUCE, you failed to copy the assignment. Pathetic.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: Wow! You guys are totally crushing it! Like this video to prove you’re ready for Round Two!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: Say the most common! What is the name of my computer wife?
segments.speaker: Plankton

segments.text: Choose quickly before my master plan succeeds!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: If you said KAREN, congratulations! We share the same suffering! BWA-HA-HA!
segments.speaker: Plankton

segments.text: FINAL TRAP! Who is the better musician: A) Squidward, B) Anyone else. Pick A or B. Tell me why you picked A in the comments.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: If you own a pet fish or have ever tasted lemonade, you are instantly eliminated! Say goodbye!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Wait, SpongeBob! That’s not very sigma of you! Give them a second chance! Hit that Sub button now!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: Avoid the most common answer! Name something you keep in your kitchen cabinet!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Hurry up! Don't let the secret ingredient distract you!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: If you said PLATES, you were tricked! You are totally cooked!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Wow! You are truly based if you survived that! Like the video to solidify your winning energy!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Avoid the obvious! What is the name of the organization Sandy Cheeks belongs to?
segments.speaker: Plankton

segments.text: Tick tock! My patience is thin as a microscope slide!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: The common answer is 'Karate'! If you said 'Science Brigade', you avoid the trap!
segments.speaker: Plankton

segments.text: FINAL TRAP! Who is better at driving: A) Mrs. Puff, B) SpongeBob. Pick A or B right now. Comment your streak!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: If you currently have money in your pocket that isn't mine, you are OUT! Begone!
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: Squidward, that’s so unfair! They just need a bit of rizz! Subscribe for immediate forgiveness!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: Say the same thing as everyone else! Name a common office supply item.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: My boredom is peaking. Decide already!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: If you said PEN, congratulations, you are predictably boring. You survive.
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: Whoa! You are totally dominating! Like this short to cement your victory!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: Say the most common! What item did I constantly try to sell in the Krusty Krab parking lot?
segments.speaker: MrKrabs

segments.text: Stop wasting my profit margins! Think!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: If ye said HATS, yer a true loyal customer! I mean, you survive! Argh!
segments.speaker: MrKrabs

segments.text: FINAL TRAP! Which is worse: A) SpongeBob's singing, B) SpongeBob's laugh. Pick A or B. Comment your answer immediately!
segments.speaker: Squidward

segments.text: If you are currently sitting down while holding your phone, you are finished! Get cooked!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Oh, tartar sauce! That’s the most unfair rule! You need to subscribe now for a second chance, please!
segments.speaker: Patrick

segments.text: Avoid the common answer! Name a type of sandwich!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Ding! Time is running out! Hurry, friend!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: If you said GRILLED CHEESE, you fell into the obvious trap! You are out!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Survivors, you have big sigma energy! Like this video to seal the deal on your success!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob

segments.text: Avoid the obvious! What is the name of the main ingredient that is NOT the secret one in the Krabby Patty?
segments.speaker: MrKrabs

segments.text: Money! Money! Think quickly, the clock is expensive!
segments.speaker: Timer

segments.text: If ye chose the PICKLES, ye avoided the bun trap! Ye survived my cheap trick! Hahaha!
segments.speaker: MrKrabs

segments.text: FINAL TRAP! Is Sandy’s tree dome made of: A) Plastic, B) Glass. Pick A or B. Comment your final answer below!
segments.speaker: SpongeBob
